title: Entity Random Hover Behavior
description: Allows the mob to hover around randomly, close to the surface.

hover_height.title: Hover Height
hover_height.description:
The height above the surface which the mob will try to maintain

Sample values:
• allay: [1,4]

interval.title: Interval
interval.description:
A random value to determine when to randomly move somewhere. This has a 1/interval chance to choose this goal

Sample values:
• allay: 1

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• allay: 9

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

xz_dist.title: Xz Dist
xz_dist.description:
Distance in blocks on ground that the mob will look for a new spot to move to. Must be at least 1

Sample values:
• allay: 8

y_dist.title: y Dist
y_dist.description:
Distance in blocks that the mob will look up or down for a new spot to move to. Must be at least 1

Sample values:
• allay: 8

y_offset.title: y Offset
y_offset.description:
Height in blocks to add to the selected target position

Sample values:
• allay: -1
